1784770.name: The Music Of™: Negative Nancy
1784770.description:
Experience a world where you always know what to say.

Adrift on an ocean of pure 'No', this is the only soundtrack for your way of life. Set sail, and allow composer Angus M.V. Arnold to be the captain of your dreams.

Feel his firm yet gentle hand on the rudder of your imagination as you explore the original soundtrack of Negative Nancy.

Accept no substitute for pure auditory bliss.
